# Compliance Standards

All applications must comply with the following regulatory requirements:

## Data Protection

- Personal data must be encrypted at rest and in transit
- Data retention policies must be documented and enforced
- GDPR compliance is mandatory for EU-facing applications

## Audit Trail

- All data modifications must be logged with timestamps and actor identity
- Audit logs must be immutable and retained for 7 years
- Access to audit logs must be restricted to authorized personnel
